last_run_window: Thu 2 Jul 2026 ~9:08am MYT through Fri 3 Jul 2026 ~1:21am MYT (June NFP miss +57K, unemployment 4.2%; semi/memory selloff spreads to Asia + new DRAM price-fixing suit)

stories.headline: June NFP miss (+57K vs ~110-115K est.), unemployment ticks down to 4.2%, jobless claims 215K (below forecast); 10yr yield eases to 4.47%, Sept rate-hike odds fall to ~50% from ~65%

Semiconductor/memory selloff extends to a second day and spreads to Asia: SMH -3%, Micron -4% (-12% wk), SanDisk -11% intraday (-20%+ 2-day), Teradyne/KLA -8%, Samsung/SK Hynix -9%+ in Korea; new DRAM price-fixing class action and Citrini note flagging AI-capex memory-cost risk
